sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Calls Medtric API to retrieve warranty entitlements using device serial number. Returns customer_name, device_name, warranty_details, warranty_expiry_date, purchase_date, and device_serial_number.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Lookup Device Warranty
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.post_message: Device warranty information retrieved from Medtric API.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.pre_message: Calling Medtric Warranty API to look up device entitlements...
